case_title: LOUIE, LILA DBA TRI-ANGEL INVESTMENT COMPANY vs. MORELAND, DEBRA G. et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MORELAND, BEMAS CARUTHERS AKA J.C. CARUTHERS

#1 BENSON/BAUER: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY R OWYANG. DEFT D MORELAND PRESENT W/ ATTY E SAFIRE. DEFT B C MORELAND WILL BE DISMISSED. CASE SETTLED. JDMT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT D MORELAND. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORELAND, DEBRA G. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 264 BRADFORD $2,900.00 RENT, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,675.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT VACATES ON TIME, PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL MONEY, SET ASIDE JDMT & DISMISS. COSTS PER COST BILL.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, LILA DBA TRI-ANGEL INVESTMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MORELAND, DEBRA G. MORELAND, BEMAS CARUTHERS AKA J.C. CARUTHERS DOES 1 TO TEN SUMMONS ISSUED
